eventTriggers.description: Wake when a held paper position is testing a major 5m support or resistance level.
Wake on a clean breakout or reclaim in a watched symbol with momentum follow-through.
Wake when a watched symbol fails a retest after losing a key level.
Wake when a live paper position trades close enough to the stop to require active management attention.
Wake when a held paper trend trade reaches a planned scale-out zone.
Wake when BTC makes a sharp move that materially changes the thesis for an alt paper position.

notes: Oracle paper style is momentum and relative-strength biased with strict 5m chart-location gating.
Timer cadence is 5 minutes in Phase 1 because state-based flat/open cadence is not active yet; target steady-state is 15 minutes when flat and 5 minutes when holding a position.
Stand down is preferred over forcing trades; event wakes are intended to surface meaningful structure, not create trades automatically.
Trend trades should scale out into strength. Chop trades should use smaller targets and faster time-stops.
